ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* Link to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_type" TEXT /* Type of blockchain (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used (e.g., SHA-256, Ethash) */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency, if applicable */,
  "current_circulating_supply" REAL /* Current circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the cryptocurrency's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the data is recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day for which the data is recorded */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "avg_market_cap" REAL /* Average market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "avg_volume" REAL /* Average trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the cryptocurrency's price */,
  "market_cap_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the cryptocurrency by market capitalization */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* JSON array of trading pairs (e.g., BTC/USD, BTC/ETH) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume on the date */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* JSON array of trading pairs (e.g., BTC/USD, BTC/ETH) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap_history" (
  "cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market cap record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market cap data */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* JSON array of trading pairs (e.g., BTC/USD, BTC/ETH) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market cap data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_cap_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_history" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume data */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "trading_pairs" TEXT /* JSON array of trading pairs (e.g., BTC/USD, BTC/ETH) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the volume data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_history" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the supply data */,
  "supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the supply data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_history" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility data */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the cryptocurrency's price */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the volatility data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language (e.g., en, es) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings in JSON format */,
  "chart_preferences" TEXT /* Chart preferences in JSON format */,
  "report_preferences" TEXT /* Report preferences in JSON format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency (if applicable) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, analysis, trade) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the activity record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "service" TEXT /* Service or feature the user is subscribed to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription will renew */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subscription record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, volatility) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the alert is active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
